title: Add command payload models and serializer helpers
description: Implement payload models/helpers for Draw/SendHttpGif, Draw/CommandList, Device/PlayTFGif, Draw/SendHttpText, Draw/ClearHttpText.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented V2 native payload modeling through the new  module and Pixoo command payload builders for HttpGif upload, PlayTFGif playback, and text overlay commands.
